nasb.text: ‘Now when you offer a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord, you shall offer it so that you may be accepted.

esv.text: “When you offer a sacrifice of peace offerings to the Lord, you shall offer it so that you may be accepted.

cnv.text: “如果你們獻平安祭給耶和華，要使你們所獻的蒙悅納。

ccb.text: 你们献平安祭给我时，要使你们所献的蒙悦纳。
